## Source: amazon-inspector (a0873d8250c8747e1115c2866076509122f7e9ea8f4dde4dca4920d0f31f4874)
The package jquery-display was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a467cf539f97f5439ab6ce7200d492d507d89b51ed9b63a60baa47bed56e6d01)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'jquery-display' @ 99.9.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
